implementationArtifact.specBody:
---
complexity: low
---

# Feature: Add Footer

## Summary

Add a simple footer to the bottom of every page with copyright text.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Footer appears at the bottom of the page
- [ ] Footer contains copyright text with the current year and "BrewBoard"

## Technical Approach

Add a footer element to `src/app/page.tsx`. One line, no complex styling needed.

## Out of Scope

- Do NOT write tests
- Do NOT add documentation
- Do NOT refactor existing code

## Validation

```bash
echo "Feature Add Footer validated"
```

quality.summary: Footer added to src/app/page.tsx with current year and 'BrewBoard' text, satisfying both acceptance criteria. Change is minimal (3 lines) and styling is consistent with Tailwind utility classes used elsewhere. Empty implementation log was created but not filled in.

requirements.notes: Both acceptance criteria met: footer appears at bottom of page and contains copyright with current year and 'BrewBoard'. Out-of-scope items (tests, docs, refactors) correctly avoided.

correctness.notes: Valid JSX, semantic <footer> element, `new Date().getFullYear()` correctly evaluates the year at render time. No type or integration issues.

minimality.notes: Three-line change to page.tsx is appropriately tight. The auto-generated empty implementation log adds a few lines of churn but is a workflow artifact, not gratuitous code.

code_quality.notes: Tailwind classes (mt-8, text-center, text-stone-500, text-sm) match the project's styling conventions. Readable and consistent. Implementation log was created but left empty — minor quality miss.

risk.notes: Semantic <footer> tag is accessibility-friendly. Only applies to the home page rather than 'every page', but spec's technical approach explicitly scoped the change to page.tsx, so this is acceptable. No regressions introduced.
